title: Atoz My Little Kitchen Party Time Tea Set, 15 Pieces, Colourful Plastic Tea Set with Teapot, Cups, Saucers and Spoons
features: COMPLETE SET: 15-piece tea party set includes teapot, sugar bowl, creamer, 4 teacups, 4 saucers, and 4 spoons in vibrant colours
COLOURFUL DESIGN: Beautiful pastel colours in yellow, pink, blue, and green with decorative heart patterns on each piece
CHILD-FRIENDLY: Lightweight plastic construction makes it perfect for little hands and safe pretend play tea parties
MATCHING PIECES: Coordinated set features cups with matching saucers and spoons in four different colours
PLAY VALUE: Encourages imaginative play, social skills development, and hand-eye coordination through interactive tea party roleplay
description: Product Description Delight your little one with this charming 15-piece Party Time Tea Set from My Little Kitchen! Perfect for imaginative play, this colourful tea set includes everything needed for a magical tea party. The set features a cheerful yellow teapot with a pink lid, a lovely green sugar bowl, and a matching creamer, complemented by four delightful cups with coordinating saucers and spoons in vibrant yellow, pink, blue, and green colours. Each piece is adorned with sweet heart designs, adding an extra touch of whimsy. Made from durable plastic, it's ideal for little hands to handle safely during pretend play sessions. The set encourages social interaction, role-playing, and helps develop fine motor skills while children pour imaginary tea and serve their favourite stuffed animals or friends. This tea set makes teatime truly special and creates endless opportunities for memorable playtime adventures. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Chocking hazard - small parts.
